zh.Haarlem, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix van Haarlem於1205年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆時，她的父親Wouter Symons van Haarlem30歲，母親Badeloch II van Amstel15歲。她於大約1220年與Gerard I Lord of Egmond結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1262年12月20日在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登享年57歲。

zh-hans.Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mozambique: 莫桑比克特卡拉 巴薩坎迪亞
zh-hans.Haarlem, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix van Haarlem于1205年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德哈阿爾姆时，她的父亲Wouter Symons van Haarlem30岁，母亲Badeloch II van Amstel15岁。她于大约1220年与Gerard I Lord of Egmond结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1262年12月20日在荷兰-拉藍德萊登享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix van Haarlem was born in 1205, in Haarlem, North Holland, Netherlands, her father, Wouter Symons van Haarlem, was 30 and her mother, Badeloch II van Amstel, was 15. She married Gerard I Lord of Egmond about 1220. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 December 1262, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix van Haarlem est née en 1205, à Haarlem, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Wouter Symons van Haarlem, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Badeloch II van Amstel, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Gerard I Lord of Egmond environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 décembre 1262, à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix van Haarlem 1205 in Haarlem, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wouter Symons van Haarlem 30 und ihre Mutter Badeloch II van Amstel 15. Sie hat um 1220 Gerard I Lord of Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Dezember 1262 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix van Haarlem è nata il nel 1205 nel Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Wouter Symons van Haarlem, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Badeloch II van Amstel, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Gerard I Lord of Egmond circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 dicembre 1262, nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Haarlemが1205年にオランダノオルド-hオランドハアルレムで生まれた時，父Wouter Symons van Haarlemは30歳，母Badeloch II van Amstelは15歳であった。約1220年にGerard I Lord of Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1262年12月20日にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix van Haarlem(이)가 1205년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 하알렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wouter Symons van Haarlem(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Badeloch II van Amstel(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 Gerard I Lord of Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 12월 20일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix van Haarlem nasceu em 1205, em Haarlem, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Wouter Symons van Haarlem, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Badeloch II van Amstel, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerard I Lord of Egmond aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1262, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix van Haarlem родилась в 1205 г. в местности хаарлем, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Wouter Symons van Haarlem было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Badeloch II van Amstel, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard I Lord of Egmond около 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 декабря 1262 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix van Haarlem nació en 1205, en Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Wouter Symons van Haarlem, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Badeloch II van Amstel, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Gerard I Lord of Egmond aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1262, en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 57 años.
